name: Rack of Lamb with Mustard Crust and Pesto
recipeIngredient: 2 racks of lamb (1 1/2 pounds each), well trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Heat a heavy large ovenproof skillet over high heat.
3. Add lamb to the skillet and cook until brown, turning occasionally about 7 minutes.
4. Remove lamb from the skillet; let it cool slightly.
5. Spread mustard evenly over lamb.
6. In a bowl, combine breadcrumbs, garlic, rosemary, and thyme.
7. Press the breadcrumb mixture onto lamb.
8. Season lamb with salt and pepper.
9. Return lamb to the skillet and roast in oven until desired doneness (about 35 minutes for medium-rare).
10. Transfer lamb to a cutting board. Pour off fat from the skillet.
11. Add broth to the skillet; bring to boil, scraping up any browned bits.
12. Reduce to 1/2 cup (about 2 minutes).
13. Whisk in butter.
14. Slice lamb into chops.
15. Divide chops among 4 plates.
16. Pour sauce over and drizzle pesto over. Serve.
